observations: Reproduced stale project shells on S21 before fix: Codex Sync Verify 214446, E2E PayApp Sync 20260406-132310, E2E PayApp Sync 20260406-132811 remained locally despite being out of scope.
After the historical scope-repair pass, S21 SQLite projects count dropped 5 -> 2 and stale pay_applications/export_artifacts tied to the removed project disappeared.
Windows scope repair evicted stale local shells too; UI now shows only VRF-Oakridge aun53 for the current user scope.
Active in-scope pay-app tombstones remain present on both clients after repair.
Residual integrity drift remains for entry_equipment, entry_quantities, entry_contractors, and inspector_forms.
